funFactZh: 北极燕鸥每年往返南北极，是地球上迁徙距离最长的鸟类！
funFactEn: The Arctic Tern migrates pole-to-pole every year — the longest migration of any bird on Earth!

nameZh: 斑尾塍鹬跨太平洋之旅
funFactZh: 斑尾塍鹬能连续飞行11天不休息，横跨整个太平洋！
funFactEn: The Bar-tailed Godwit can fly non-stop for 11 days across the entire Pacific Ocean!

funFactZh: 家燕每年从欧洲飞到非洲南部过冬，往返超过2万公里！
funFactEn: Barn Swallows fly from Europe to southern Africa each winter — a round trip of over 20,000 km!

funFactZh: 白鹳利用热气流滑翔，几乎不需要拍打翅膀就能飞越数千公里！
funFactEn: White Storks ride thermal currents and can soar thousands of kilometers with barely a wingbeat!

nameZh: 红喉蜂鸟墨西哥湾之旅
funFactZh: 红喉蜂鸟体重仅3克，却能一口气飞越800公里的墨西哥湾！
funFactEn: Weighing just 3 grams, the Ruby-throated Hummingbird flies 800 km non-stop across the Gulf of Mexico!

funFactZh: 美洲鹤是北美最稀有的鸟类之一，野生种群不到800只！
funFactEn: The Whooping Crane is one of North America's rarest birds — fewer than 800 exist in the wild!
